title: Analytics - Location Permission Granted
scenario: Location permission choice (allow/deny) logged in Firebase analytics event "location_permission_granted" on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. When prompted for location permissions, observe the system dialog asking for Allow or Deny.
3. Tap either "Allow" or "Deny" on the location permission dialog.
4. Open Firebase Analytics console and navigate to the Events section.
6. Verify the event is logged with the user's choice (allow or deny) as a parameter.
7. Check the default analytics elements: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
expected: The user's choice (allow or deny) for location permissions is logged in Firebase under the "location_permission_granted" analytics event. Default analytics elements (graph, events in last 30 min, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) are populated correctly.
